calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-07-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2008 Off Calendar

Ntc And Motion Compelling Responses To Requests For Production
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Granite Excavation & Demolition Inc.'s motion to compel responses to request for production of documents is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2007 Set For Trial On May-12-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-23-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 210
